creator: dtatters@gmail.com
text:
The configure step requests the inclusion of <sys/stropts.h> which doesn't exist. This inclusion is in screen.c and tty.c.  

CPP="cc -E " srcdir=. sh ./osdef.sh
AWK=gawk CC="cc -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing" srcdir=. sh ./comm.sh
AWK=gawk srcdir=. sh ./term.sh
cc -c -I. -I.    -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing screen.c
screen.c:54:26: error: sys/stropts.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/screen.  make, and accept the default configuration.
